expected: standard output contains usage text
standard output contains Sudo version

exercises: -v/--validate updates cached credentials without running a command
expected: validate exits successfully for permitted root user
reset timestamp exits successfully
remove timestamp exits successfully

exercises: -n/--non-interactive runs without prompting when no password is needed
expected: command output is produced
command receives -x as its own argument
assigned variable appears in command environment
selected existing variable appears in command environment
listed variable appears in command environment
command reports uid 0
command reports primary gid 0

exercises: -H/--set-home requests HOME set to target user's home directory
expected: HOME equals root's passwd home directory
specified command output is produced
specified command output is produced

exercises: -b/--background runs the given command in the background
expected: background command eventually writes marker

exercises: -l/--list without a command lists invoking user's privileges
expected: list exits successfully for permitted root user

exercises: -U/--other-user with -l lists privileges for another user
expected: listing root's privileges exits successfully as root

exercises: successful command execution returns the command's exit status
expected: sudo exits with status 7 from the executed command
sudo exits nonzero for nonexistent command
sudo exits nonzero for -C 2

exercises: -K/--remove-timestamp may not be used with a command
expected: sudo exits nonzero when -K is combined with a command

exercises: options that take a value may only be specified once
expected: sudo exits nonzero for duplicate -u option
sudo exits nonzero for a name containing equals

exercises: sudoedit/edit mode forbids environment variable assignments
expected: sudo exits nonzero when VAR=value is specified in edit mode

exercises: -e/--edit creates a specified file that does not exist
expected: target file contains editor-written contents

exercises: sudoedit refuses to edit symbolic links by default
expected: sudo exits nonzero when editing a symlink
